message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Administrative" as admin
participant ":AddScooterUI" as ui
participant ":AddScooterController" as controller
participant ":Pharmacy" as pharmacy
participant "ls:ListScooters" as list
participant "sc:Scooter" as scooter
participant "bat:Battery" as battery
database "scdb:ScooterDB" as scooterDB
database "batdb:BatteryDB" as batteryDB

admin -> ui : 1 begins the process of adding a scooter
activate ui
ui --> admin : 2 asks for the necessary data(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
admin -> ui : 3 inserts the solicited data
ui -> controller : 4 newScooter(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
activate controller
controller -> pharmacy : 5 ls = getListScooters()
activate pharmacy
pharmacy --> controller : 
deactivate pharmacy
controller -> list : 6 sc=newScooter(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
activate list
list -> scooter : 7 create(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
activate scooter
scooter -> battery : 8 create(id_Battery, capacity)
activate battery
battery -> battery : 9 validateBattery(bat)
deactivate battery
deactivate scooter
list --> controller : 
deactivate list
controller -> list : 10 validateScooter(sc)
activate list
list --> controller : 
deactivate list
controller --> ui : 
deactivate controller
ui --> admin : 11 validates the data, presents it and asks the administrator for its confirmation
admin -> ui : 12 confirms
ui -> controller : 13 registerScooter()
activate controller
controller -> list : 14 registerScooter(sc)
activate list
list -> list : 15 validateScooter(sc)
list -> list : 16 addScooters(sc)
list -> scooter : 17 save(sc)
activate scooter
scooter -> scooterDB : 18 save(sc)
activate scooterDB
scooterDB --> scooter : 
deactivate scooterDB
scooter -> batteryDB : 19 save(bat)
activate batteryDB
batteryDB --> scooter : 
deactivate batteryDB
deactivate scooter
list --> controller : 
deactivate list
controller --> ui : 
deactivate controller
ui --> admin : 20 adds the scooter to a list of scooters
deactivate ui

@enduml
```
